description:
Privacy-first UnifiedPush distributor with an optional self-hosted server Prism is a UnifiedPush distributor and companion app for the self-hosted Prism server. It provides push notifications to UnifiedPush-compatible apps on your device. When paired with a Prism server, it can also receive notifications sent via the server's ntfy-compatible webhook API or its built-in integrations (Signal, Telegram, Proton Mail). Prism server features:
  • ntfy-compatible webhook API for sending notifications from any source
  • Signal, Telegram, and Proton Mail integrations
  • End-to-end encrypted WebPush delivery to this app
  • Manual apps/topics for custom notification sources
  • Material You with light and dark themes
